text: Versatile technical project manager with a proven track record in deploying innovative cloud solutions and leveraging AI technologies to drive business transformation and growth.

Customer-focused Senior Product Manager with over 5 years of experience leading product development from concept to implementation, cross-team strategies, and utilizing data to create compelling product visions.
Launched and managed a consultancy from February 2024 to Present providing AI solutions to small and mid-sized law firms.
Designed automated document-management and case-tracking systems for law firms, delivering a 40% reduction in manual work and improving productivity.
Provided training sessions for law firm staff on newly automated systems to ensure smooth transitions and effective utilization.
Built and managed a sales pipeline handling end-to-end sales processes and closed multiple SMB deals in the legal tech sector.
Implemented Clio-based workflows and mapped complex client workflows to build customized AI and automation systems, significantly enhancing firm performance and reducing operational errors.

Managed differentiated workflow systems for real estate transactions (buyer/seller), requested title documents, drafted affidavits for title clearance, managed HOA document procurement, and maintained professional communications with clients/third parties.
Served as Client Solution Architect at AHEAD from February 2022 to January 2024.
Championed a critical server initiative securing the primary vendor position for a top-tier airline client, resulting in a $10M contract.
Spearheaded data-center modernization and server optimization projects, increasing infrastructure reliability by 30% through design optimizations.
Led the design and deployment of server configurations optimized for AI applications, enhancing performance by 40% for a major airline.
Managed a team of 20+ engineers in the rollout of a comprehensive cloud services suite, delivering on schedule and improving reliability by 30%.

Led technology engagements for Fortune 500 companies, translating complex solutions into business cases, crafting advanced infrastructure strategies that enhanced client operations and expanded market share by 15%.
Secured competitive victories in storage solutions, increasing market share by 20% through strategic positioning.
Achieved a 15% increase in solution uptake through targeted training and integration strategies, and enriched the solutions portfolio leading to a 25% improvement in client satisfaction.
Served as Client Solution Executive for AT&T Select Markets in Chicago from September 2020 to January 2023.
Ranked as a Top 10 Sales Associate in the Central Market in 2021, driving a 20% increase in network solutions sales.
Managed and grew a portfolio of 200+ business accounts, securing multi-year enterprise contracts exceeding $2M.
Increased upsell revenue by 25% and customer retention by 20% with tailored strategic solutions.
Directed the design and implementation of tailored network solutions that enhanced customer operations, resulting in a 95% satisfaction rate.
Coordinated internal and external cross-functional teams to design end-to-end network solutions, maintaining a sales pipeline of 50+ active deals and achieving a 30% increase in deal closures.
Served as Sales Executive for AT&T Small Business in Chicago from July 2018 to August 2020.
Exceeded sales targets by over 100% YTD in 2018 and 2019, driving $5M in revenue growth and increasing SMB revenue in Chicago by 10%.
Initiated and led a training program for new hires that improved team performance and sales metrics by 25% within the first year.
Served as B2B Sales Development Representative for AT&T in Dallas from March 2018 to July 2018, specializing in consultative selling and developing customized network solutions.
Directed strategic account planning and complex sales cycles for Global Fortune 500, Mid-Market, and Public Sector clients, conducting high-level C-suite presentations.
Functioned as primary single point of contact for enterprise clients, managing long-term loyalty and orchestrating data-driven Executive Business Reviews (EBRs) utilizing CSAT/NPS scores.
Managed high-value sales funnels within Salesforce B2B, maintaining stage governance from lead qualification (BANT framework) to final contract execution via CPQ tools (Apttus/Conga).
Engineered software-defined networking solutions including AT&T Dedicated Internet (ADI), Switched Ethernet on Demand (ASEoD), and SD-WAN (VeloCloud/Cisco).
Architected mobile-first collaboration environments using RingCentral, AT&T Collaborate, and Cloud Voice for Microsoft Teams.
Implemented network-embedded security strategies, including Managed SASE and Managed Trusted Internet Protocol Service (MTIPS) for federal compliance.
Facilitated hybrid-cloud migrations via AT&T NetBond for Cloud (private peering with AWS/Azure/Salesforce) and globally distributed Colocation Services.
Bachelor of Science in Business, Supply Chain Management from Indiana University Kelley School of Business (August 2014 – April 2017). Presidential Scholar Distinction.
Raised $4.15M for Riley Hospital for Children in 2017. Served as Culture Chair of Recruitment Committee for Indiana University Dance Marathon.
